title: session.update
description: A streamed agent update. `update` is the verbatim ACP SessionNotification.update (agent_message_chunk, tool_call, plan, etc.), so its shape is owned by the ACP schema and intentionally not constrained here. The daemon adds `session_id` and a monotonic `seq`.

update.description: Verbatim ACP session/update payload; see the agent-client-protocol schema.
